## TRM1.1. Additional time in taxi-out phase (PI#4)

The additional time in 2025 decreased to 2.65 min/dep, 10% below 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 2.95 min/dep (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 3.61 min/dep.
